name: Easy Launcher - Minimal launcher
description: Features:- Favorite App Quick Access: Display your most-used apps on the home screen in text format for swift access, streamlining your operations. - Hide Apps: Easily conceal apps you don't want visible, keeping your home screen clean and focused on essential content. - Rename Apps: Personalize your apps with custom names that sync seamlessly between favorites and all apps. - Locking: Secure your privacy and data with fingerprint lock for selected apps and settings. - No Internet Permissions: No use of INTERNET permissions, ensuring your data remains private.
